name: venture-capital-intelligence
tagline: Built with love & rationality for the venture capital & startup ecosystem.
description:
3 skills · 6 agents · 9 commands — Your complete intelligence layer for venture capital and startups.

HOW TO USE:
• Evaluating a startup? → Describe it and get an 8-dimension score with a PASS / CONDITIONAL PASS / DECLINE verdict
• Reviewing a pitch deck? → Share the slides and get slide-by-slide scores, red flags, and specific rewrites
• Confused by a term sheet or SAFE? → Ask any clause in plain English and get the investor and founder perspective
• Modeling a company's financials? → Input the numbers and get DCF valuation + SaaS metrics (LTV/CAC, burn multiple, Rule of 40)
• Figuring out your cap table? → Input your rounds and SAFEs to see exactly who owns what — and what happens at exit
• Sizing a market? → Describe the opportunity and get TAM/SAM/SOM with a VC viability check (is it venture-scale?)
• Sourcing deals? → Scan any company for 6 signal types: Hiring · Funding · Product · Team · Market · Tech
• Reporting to LPs? → Input your fund data and get TVPI, DPI, IRR, MOIC + a ready-to-send quarterly narrative

Works for: VCs · Founders · Angels · PE firms · Family offices · Accelerators
Built with love & rationality for the venture capital & startup ecosystem.
